description_long: This is a two-story white bungalow with a flat roof and a modern, boxy architectural style. The structure features multiple rectangular windows arranged symmetrically on the front and sides, and a small, open courtyard area with a paved path leading to the entrance. The property is surrounded by a low boundary wall and includes a driveway with a parked car, as well as several mature trees providing greenery around the house. The front yard is landscaped with stepping stones and a small gate, enhancing the residential feel. The exterior walls are smooth and painted white, with minimal decorative elements, emphasizing a clean and contemporary look. The overall layout suggests a comfortable urban residence with outdoor space for parking and leisure.
description: A modern, two-story white bungalow with a flat roof, symmetrical windows, a courtyard, driveway, and surrounding trees.
description_view_0: Side view showing the plain white wall, upper windows, and several trees behind the house.
description_view_1: Angled view highlighting the driveway, parked car, front courtyard, and more visible windows.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the main entrance, symmetrical window arrangement, courtyard, and boundary wall.
description_view_3: Rear-side view showing the back of the house, more trees, and the driveway extending to the side.
